name: Max Swings
about: Max Swings is an indoor golf facility offering a comprehensive golf experience under one roof. The venue features simulators with complimentary club rentals, making it accessible for those without their own equipment. They operate on an hourly booking model, with options for parties and memberships that provide discounted rates and priority scheduling. The facility is designed to be a fun, local space for golf year-round, emphasizing ease and flexibility for both individual and group play.
why_golfers_like_it: Complimentary golf club rentals included with every booking
Flexible party packages and hourly bay reservations for any occasion
Membership perks include discounted tee times and priority booking
Hosting leagues and tournaments for competitive and casual play
Coming soon club fitting services for personalized equipment

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food not allowed except for cake and ice cream for parties
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy

faq.question: Do I need golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, golf club rentals are always included with your booking at no extra charge.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food is not allowed, except for cake and ice cream when booking a party package.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website mentions party packages for 9-hole and 18-hole events but does not specify the duration for 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Max Swings offers party packages and appears to be a family-friendly environment suitable for various events.
